description.value:
Trigger An adjacent ally attempts to [[/act high-jump]] or [[/act long-jump]].

You've learned to use your own athletic abilities and springy legs to help others who need a boost with their leaps. The triggering ally gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.High Jump] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Long Jump]. This bonus increases to +2 if you're an expert in Athletics, +3 if you're a master, and +4 if you're legendary. Additionally, the triggering ally's [[/act leap]] distance on a successful check increases by 2 feet for a High Jump or 5 feet for a Long Jump, even if it would allow the ally to Leap further than their land Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Bounce Boost]
